requirement_topic.en: Connector Interoperability — GB/T 20234 vs IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2
requirement_topic.zh: 接口互操作——GB/T 20234与IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2
requirement_topic.zht: 接口互操作——GB/T 20234與IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2

summary.en: Bhutan's EV charging direction should be treated as IEC-aligned, with AC charging using IEC 62196-2 Type 2 and DC fast charging using CCS2 under IEC 62196-3. This direction aligns with regional project practice and cross-border vehicle compatibility rather than the North American J1772 / CCS1 ecosystem. Connector conformity becomes mandatory when written into BSB-adopted standards, BEA or BPC project requirements, procurement specifications, site-owner requirements, or charge-point-operator specifications. GB/T connector-only chargers are physically and electrically incompatible with Type 2 / CCS2 deployments.
summary.zh: 不丹电动汽车充电接口方向应按IEC体系处理，交流充电采用IEC 62196-2 Type 2，直流快充采用IEC 62196-3下的CCS2。该方向与区域项目实践和跨境车辆兼容性一致，而非北美J1772 / CCS1体系。当BSB采纳标准、BEA或BPC项目要求、采购规范、场地方要求或充电点运营商规范写入该接口时，接口符合性即成为强制要求。仅支持GB/T接口的充电桩与Type 2 / CCS2部署在物理和电气层面不兼容。
summary.zht: 不丹電動汽車充電接口方向應按IEC體系處理，交流充電採用IEC 62196-2 Type 2，直流快充採用IEC 62196-3下的CCS2。該方向與區域項目實踐和跨境車輛兼容性一致，而非北美J1772 / CCS1體系。當BSB採納標準、BEA或BPC項目要求、採購規範、場地方要求或充電點運營商規範寫入該接口時，接口符合性即成為強制要求。僅支持GB/T接口的充電樁與Type 2 / CCS2部署在物理和電氣層面不兼容。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62196-3 — DC and AC/DC vehicle couplers, CCS2 configuration
IEC 61851-1:2017 — Electric vehicle conductive charging system — Part 1: General requirements
IEC 61851-23:2023 — DC electric vehicle supply equipment
BSB-adopted, BEA, BPC, tender, or project-specific IEC connector requirements where applicable

summary.en: China AC chargers use GB/T 20234.2 couplers and China DC fast chargers use GB/T 20234.3 couplers with GB/T 27930 CAN communication. GB/T AC couplers are not IEC Type 2 despite a superficially similar outline: connector gender, pin arrangement, proximity pilot, and control pilot behaviour differ. GB/T DC couplers are geometrically different from CCS2 and use a different communication architecture. China-side connector reports are therefore not accepted as evidence of IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2 interoperability.
summary.zh: 中国交流充电桩采用GB/T 20234.2耦合器，中国直流快充采用GB/T 20234.3耦合器并配套GB/T 27930 CAN通信。GB/T交流耦合器即使外形相近，也不是IEC Type 2：接口性别、针脚排列、接近导引和控制导引行为均不同。GB/T直流耦合器与CCS2几何结构不同，并采用不同通信架构。因此，中国侧接口报告不能作为IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2互操作证据。
summary.zht: 中國交流充電樁採用GB/T 20234.2耦合器，中國直流快充採用GB/T 20234.3耦合器並配套GB/T 27930 CAN通訊。GB/T交流耦合器即使外形相近，也不是IEC Type 2：接口性別、針腳排列、接近導引和控制導引行為均不同。GB/T直流耦合器與CCS2幾何結構不同，並採用不同通訊架構。因此，中國側接口報告不能作為IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2互操作證據。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 20234.2-2015 — Connection set for conductive charging of electric vehicles — Part 2: AC charging coupler
GB/T 20234.3-2023 — Connection set for conductive charging of electric vehicles — Part 3: DC charging coupler
GB/T 27930-2023 — Communication protocols between off-board conductive charger and battery management system
GB/T 18487.1-2023 — Electric vehicle conductive charging system — Part 1: General requirements

gap.en: A China GB/T-only charger requires hardware and protocol redesign for Bhutan IEC deployments: Type 2 or CCS2 coupler selection, cable assembly, locking mechanism, thermal sensors, PP/CP signalling, DC communication stack, labels, spare parts, and test reports must match the Bhutan project specification. Adapters should not be treated as a compliance substitute. Exporters should confirm the connector type with the Bhutan importer, BPC site owner, BEA-regulated operator, or tender before quotation.
gap.zh: 仅支持中国GB/T接口的充电桩如用于不丹IEC体系部署，需要进行硬件和协议重新设计：Type 2或CCS2耦合器选型、电缆组件、锁止机构、温度传感、PP/CP信号、直流通信栈、标签、备件和测试报告均须符合不丹项目规范。转接器不应被视为合规替代方案。出口商应在报价前向不丹进口商、BPC场址方、受BEA监管的运营方或招标方确认接口类型。
gap.zht: 僅支持中國GB/T接口的充電樁如用於不丹IEC體系部署，需要進行硬體和協議重新設計：Type 2或CCS2耦合器選型、電纜組件、鎖止機構、溫度傳感、PP/CP信號、直流通訊棧、標籤、備件和測試報告均須符合不丹項目規範。轉接器不應被視為合規替代方案。出口商應在報價前向不丹進口商、BPC場址方、受BEA監管的運營方或招標方確認接口類型。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2 is required by BSB-adopted standards, BEA / BPC project documents, site-owner requirements, network operator specifications, or tenders; GB/T connectors are physically incompatible
mandatory_status.cn: GB/T 20234 conformity applies to China domestic connector design and is not an IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2 substitute

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Bhutan-facing EV chargers should be planned around IEC 62196 Type 2 for AC and CCS2 for DC unless the project specification states otherwise. GB/T 20234 hardware cannot be made Bhutan-ready by paperwork alone; it needs connector, signalling, and communication redesign.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 面向不丹的电动汽车充电桩应按交流IEC 62196 Type 2和直流CCS2规划，除非项目规范另有规定。GB/T 20234硬件不能仅通过文件转换满足不丹要求；需要进行接口、信号和通信重新设计。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 面向不丹的電動汽車充電樁應按交流IEC 62196 Type 2和直流CCS2規劃，除非項目規範另有規定。GB/T 20234硬體不能僅通過文件轉換滿足不丹要求；需要進行接口、信號和通訊重新設計。
